ddls:
CREATE TABLE "encounters" (
  "encounter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encounter report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the encounter occurred */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encounter type */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the encounter occurred */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the encounter occurred */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the encounter occurred */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the encounter report */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the encounter location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the encounter location */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the encounter */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the encounter */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the encounter location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the encounter location */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Number of Bigfoot individuals observed */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the encounter (e.g., Class A, Class B) */,
  "temperature_high" REAL /* Highest temperature during the encounter */,
  "temperature_mid" REAL /* Mid-range temperature during the encounter */,
  "temperature_low" REAL /* Lowest temperature during the encounter */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point during the encounter */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the encounter */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover during the encounter */,
  "moon_phase" REAL /* Moon phase during the encounter */,
  "precip_intensity" REAL /* Precipitation intensity during the encounter */,
  "precip_probability" REAL /* Probability of precipitation during the encounter */,
  "precip_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation during the encounter */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure during the encounter */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the encounter */,
  "uv_index" INTEGER /* UV index during the encounter */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility during the encounter */,
  "wind_bearing" INTEGER /* Wind bearing during the encounter */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the encounter */,
  "narrative" TEXT /* Narrative of the encounter */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the environmental conditions */,
  "witness_count" INTEGER /* Number of witnesses */,
  "witness_names" TEXT /* Names of the witnesses */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report has been verified */,
  "verification_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the verification process */,
  "media_count" INTEGER /* Number of media files associated with the report */,
  "report_source" TEXT /* Source of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encounter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encounters_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES encounter_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encounters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encounters_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, contributor, moderator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  "verification_level" TEXT /* Verification level of the user (e.g., basic, verified, expert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_files" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "encounter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encounter report the media file belongs to */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the media file (e.g., photo, video) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the media file */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media file */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the media file has been verified */,
  "verification_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the verification process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_files_encounter_id FOREIGN KEY ("encounter_id") REFERENCES encounters ("encounter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the encounter occurred */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the encounter occurred */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the encounter occurred */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the encounter occurred */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the encounter location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the encounter location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "geographic_description" TEXT /* Description of the geographic features */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encounter_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encounter type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the encounter type (e.g., Class A, Class B) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the encounter type */,
  "credibility_score" INTEGER /* Credibility score of the encounter type */,
  "example_reports" TEXT /* Example reports for the encounter type */,
  "research_notes" TEXT /* Research notes and findings related to the encounter type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "encounter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encounter report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_encounter_id FOREIGN KEY ("encounter_id") REFERENCES encounters ("encounter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
